title: Statistics for Machine Learning
author: Pratap Dangeti
description: Build Machine Learning models with a sound statistical understanding.About This Book* Learn about the statistics behind powerful predictive models with p-value, ANOVA, and F- statistics.* Implement statistical computations programmatically for supervised and unsupervised learning through K-means clustering.* Master the statistical aspect of Machine Learning with the help of this example-rich guide to R and Python.Who This Book Is ForThis book is intended for developers with little to no backgrou
